Content.argument: It's an excellent app, and Copilot is just a miracle of science. It is so human and so friendly that I have no words.

"It also cite the websites from Forbes "How To Change A Child's Last Name Legally In 2024 - Forbes" and selfhelp.court "Change child's name both parents"."

Usefulness.argument: Canva is good for making designs by yourself.
can I still get compensation if I was partially at fault in the car accident?
ChatGPT responded to my question and answered that \Compensation for injuries sustained in an accident can still be pursued
It's principally for graphic designing, but I use it more for presenting or sometimes for editing documents

Emotional Intelligence.argument: "You can correct it but it'll go 'oh sorry' and then double down."

Gemini lists 8 required documents of selling houses in California: California Disclosure Requirements, Transfer Disclosure Statement (TDS), Natural Hazard Disclosure Statement, Seller Property Questionnaire, Title Company, Escrow Agent, Home Inspection, Lead-Based Paint Disclosure. I compared the results from Gemini with the ones from ChatGPT: Megan's Law Disclosure, Purchase Agreement, Seller Property Questionnaire, Statewide Buyer and Seller Advisory are missing. But Gemini advises to include Home Inspection, Lead-Based Paint Disclosure. So maybe it'a draw between Gemini and ChatGPT on the question about real-estate law? I still needs to delve into more information about the requirements. \ \ Prompt: You are a lawyer specialized in real estate law. I will consult you a few questions. And my questions include \What are the legal requirements for selling a house in California?\""

Perplexity does a good job summarizing NVIDIA's Q1 FY25 GAAP Financial Report Summary, and gives the number of Revenue: $26.0 billion up 18% quarter-over-quarter, Gross margin: 78.4%, up 2.4 percentage points from Q4, Operating income: $16.91 billion, up 24% from Q4 and 690%, Net income: $14.88 billion, up 21% from Q4
And I even double checked the July 2024 financial data, which is correct.

Update.argument: So I am not very satisfied with this results. Why can't it have access to some financial data, at least yesterday's archived data?
ChatGPT just refused to answer my questions saying \I don't have real-time access to specific financial data for companies like Nvidia
They are slowly making improvements each week.
Hurriedly put together a new model and get it online so the paying customers can be used to see how it goes.
